title: module default parameter didn't take effect

features.name: module parameter default value bit type
features.description: Code should include a module parameter with a default value of type bit

features.name: if-generate using module parameter
features.description: Code should include an if-generate statement that depends on a module parameter to control instantiation
features.snippet: if (PRIV_ICACHE) begin : gen_priv_icache icache_hier_top #(.FETCH_ADDR_WIDTH(32)) i_icache(); end

features.name: module instantiation without parameter override
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where a parameter with default value is not explicitly passed, relying on the default
